theme_description: Policy library theme for legal and compliance sites—terms, privacy, cookies, acceptable use, and DPAs—with versioning and update notices.

title.label: Title
title.info: Article title displayed above the content

index_list.name: Home (list)
index_list.description: List-style home with search and tag filters.

index_card.name: Home (cards)
index_card.description: Card grid home with sorting by publish date.

index_side.name: Home (side nav)
index_side.description: Side-navigation home layout for legal hubs.

head_html.label: Custom HTML in <head></head> tags
head_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
head_html.placeholder: Usually used for analytics, customer service bot, etc.

header_menu_html.label: Insert HTML in Top Navigation Area
header_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
header_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used for company website navigation links

footer_menu_html.label: Insert HTML in Footer Area
footer_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
footer_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used for external navigation links, friend links, SEO optimization links, etc.
